Name: FGameplayTagQuery
Description:
Queries are internally represented as a byte stream that is memory-efficient and can be evaluated quickly at runtime.
  Note: these have an extensive details and graph pin customization for editing, so there is no need to expose the internals to Blueprints.

Variables.Name: TokenStreamVersion
Variables.Description: Versioning for future token stream protocol changes. See EGameplayTagQueryStreamVersion.

Variables.Name: TagDictionary
Variables.Description: List of tags referenced by this entire query. Token stream stored indices into this list.

Variables.Name: QueryTokenStream
Variables.Description: Stream representation of the actual hierarchical query
